202.reason: [This only marks the vertex as visited but does not remove its edges from the adjacency lists of other vertices. Thus, during traversal, neighbors may still try to access the deleted vertex or include it indirectly, violating the requirement to delete the vertex entirely from the graph structure.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This only marks the vertex as visited but does not remove its edges from the adjacency lists of other vertices. Thus, during traversal, neighbors may still try to access the deleted vertex or include it indirectly, violating the requirement to delete the vertex entirely from the graph structure.]

208.reason: [Same issue as above: marking as visited is insufficient for deletion; the adjacency lists must be updated to remove all references to the deleted vertex.]
